S.FORM: == Al Attles == siwkay niza Al Attles (11 a bulad 7 a demiad, 1936 a mihcan), tatama, lumeniay a tademaw. miunduay, u kanas-mali a mimaliay nu Amilika NBA. matenes ciniza mikawaw i Cinco Talul putiput. u pahanhanan tu kawaway a mimaliay atu saydang ciniza. namaala ku Suose ciniza. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alvin Austin Attles Jr. is an American retired professional basketball player and coach best known for his longtime association with the Golden State Warriors. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺ attr~…ĺ…ôs == siwkaj niza ar~…ĺ attr~…ĺ…ôs (** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶an), tatama, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw. miunduaj, u kanas-mar~…ĺi a mimar~…ĺiaj nu amir~…ĺika nba. mat…ôn…ôs ¶iniza mikawaw i ¶in ¶o tar~…ĺur~…ĺ putiput. u pańßanńßanan tu kawawaj a mimar~…ĺiaj atu sajdaŇč ¶iniza. namaar~…ĺa ku suos…ô ¶iniza. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ar~…ĺ*in austin attr~…ĺ…ôs *r. is an am…ôri ¶an r…ôtir…ôd prof…ôssionar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ pr~…ĺaj…ôr and ¶oa ¶ńß b…ôst known for ńßis r~…ĺoŇčtim…ô asso ¶iation witńß tńß…ô gor~…ĺd…ôn stat…ô warriors. kakuniza kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu
S.FORM: == Al Attles == siwkay niza Al Attles (11 a bulad 7 a demiad, 1936 a mihcan), tatama, lumeniay a tademaw. miunduay, u kanas-mali a mimaliay nu Amilika NBA. matenes ciniza mikawaw i Cinco Talul putiput. u pahanhanan tu kawaway a mimaliay atu saydang ciniza. namaala ku Suose ciniza. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alvin Austin Attles Jr. is an American retired professional basketball player and coach best known for his longtime association with the Golden State Warriors. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
